name: GitHub
description: Send authenticated requests to the GitHub REST API for repositories, contents, issues, pull requests, search, and user resources.

triggers.name: GitHub Webhook
triggers.description: Receive GitHub webhook events through Zaprun at POST /webhook/:zapId. Trigger config supports optional secret validation and events filtering.

event.description: GitHub event name from the X-GitHub-Event header (for example pull_request or push).

deliveryId.description: Unique delivery id from the X-GitHub-Delivery header.

__webhook.description: Webhook delivery metadata injected by Zaprun for GitHub triggers.

outputSchema.description: Raw GitHub webhook payload with Zaprun webhook metadata under __webhook.

actions.name: GitHub API Request
actions.description: Call any GitHub REST API endpoint with a raw HTTP configuration.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

method.description: HTTP method for the GitHub API call.

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Must be application/vnd.github+json for current API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. Latest supported version is 2026-03-10. 2022-11-28 remains supported for compatibility.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests (e.g., Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin).

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

body.description: Optional JSON body for POST, PUT, PATCH, or DELETE requests.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Get Authenticated User
actions.description: Get the GitHub user for the current OAuth connection.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Must be application/vnd.github+json for current API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. Latest supported version is 2026-03-10. 2022-11-28 remains supported for compatibility.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests (e.g., Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin).

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: List User Repositories
actions.description: List repositories visible to the authenticated user.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Must be application/vnd.github+json for current API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. Latest supported version is 2026-03-10. 2022-11-28 remains supported for compatibility.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests (e.g., Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin).

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

visibility.description: Limit results to repositories with the selected visibility. Defaults to 'all'.

affiliation.description: Comma-separated list of affiliations (e.g., owner, collaborator, organization_member).

type.description: Legacy repository type filter. Defaults to 'all'. Will be deprecated.

sort.description: Field used to sort results. Defaults to 'full_name'.

direction.description: Sort direction. Defaults to 'asc' when sorting by 'full_name', otherwise 'desc'.

page.description: Page number of the results to fetch. Defaults to 1.

queryParams.description: Optional query parameters for filtering and pagination.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Get Repository
actions.description: Get a repository by owner and repo.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Must be application/vnd.github+json for current API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. Latest supported version is 2026-03-10. 2022-11-28 remains supported for compatibility.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests (e.g., Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin).

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Create Repository
actions.description: Create a repository for the authenticated user.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Must be application/vnd.github+json for current API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. Latest supported version is 2026-03-10. 2022-11-28 remains supported for compatibility.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests (e.g., Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin).

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

description.description: A short description of the repository.

homepage.description: A URL with more information about the repository.

private.description: Whether the repository is private. Defaults to false (public).

has_issues.description: Whether issues are enabled. Defaults to true.

has_projects.description: Whether projects are enabled. Defaults to true.

has_wiki.description: Whether the wiki is enabled. Defaults to true.

auto_init.description: Creates an initial commit with an empty README. Defaults to false.

allow_squash_merge.description: Allow squash merging. Defaults to true.

allow_merge_commit.description: Allow merge commits. Defaults to true.

allow_rebase_merge.description: Allow rebase merging. Defaults to true.

allow_auto_merge.description: Allow auto merge. Defaults to false.

delete_branch_on_merge.description: Delete head branch on merge. Defaults to false.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Get Repository Contents
actions.description: Get file or directory contents from a repository. Directory listings now return submodules with type 'submodule' on API version 2026-03-10.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Must be application/vnd.github+json for current API. Supports application/vnd.github.v3.raw and application/vnd.github.v3.html for raw or rendered content.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. Latest supported version is 2026-03-10. 2022-11-28 remains supported for compatibility.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests (e.g., Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin).

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

ref.description: The name of the commit, branch, or tag. Defaults to the default branch.

queryParams.description: Optional query parameters to specify reference.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Create Or Update File
actions.description: Create a new file or update an existing file in a repository.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

url.description: Contents URL for the target file (e.g., https://api.github.com/repos/owner/repo/contents/path/to/file.txt).

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Must be application/vnd.github+json for current API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. Latest supported version is 2026-03-10. 2022-11-28 remains supported for compatibility.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests (e.g., Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin).

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

content.description: The new file content, encoded in Base64.

sha.description: Required when updating an existing file. The blob SHA of the file being replaced.

branch.description: The branch name to write to. Defaults to the repository’s default branch.

name.description: Display name for the commit identity.

email.description: Email address for the commit identity.

committer.description: Optional committer identity object. If omitted, GitHub will use the authenticated user's credentials.

name.description: Display name for the commit identity.

email.description: Email address for the commit identity.

author.description: Optional author identity object. If omitted, details from the 'committer' or authenticated user are used.

body.description: Create or update file request body. Updating an existing file requires 'sha'.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Delete File
actions.description: Delete a file from a repository.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

url.description: Contents URL for the target file (e.g., https://api.github.com/repos/owner/repo/contents/path/to/file.txt).

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Must be application/vnd.github+json for current API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. Latest supported version is 2026-03-10. 2022-11-28 remains supported for compatibility.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests (e.g., Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin).

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

message.description: The commit message for the deletion.

sha.description: The blob SHA of the file being deleted.

branch.description: The branch name to delete from. Defaults to the repository’s default branch.

name.description: Display name for the commit identity.

email.description: Email address for the commit identity.

committer.description: Optional committer identity object. If omitted, GitHub will use the authenticated user's credentials.

name.description: Display name for the commit identity.

email.description: Email address for the commit identity.

author.description: Optional author identity object. If omitted, details from the 'committer' or authenticated user are used.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: List Issues
actions.description: List issues for a repository. Read assignee data from the assignees array rather than depending on the older singular assignee field.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Must be application/vnd.github+json for current API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. Latest supported version is 2026-03-10. 2022-11-28 remains supported for compatibility.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests (e.g., Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin).

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

anyOf.description: Use '*' for any milestone or 'none' for no milestone.

milestone.description: Milestone number, or '*' for any, or 'none' for no milestone.

state.description: Filter by issue state. Defaults to 'open'.

assignee.description: Deprecated: Login for the user to filter by. Use 'assignees' instead. Use 'none' for unassigned or '*' for any assigned.

creator.description: Login for the user who created the issue.

mentioned.description: Login for the user who is mentioned in the issue.

sort.description: Field to sort by. Defaults to 'created'.

since.description: Only show results updated at or after this time (ISO 8601 format).

page.description: Page number of the results to fetch. Defaults to 1.

assignees.description: Comma-separated list of usernames to filter by multiple assignees (e.g., 'octocat,hubot').

queryParams.description: Optional query parameters for filtering and pagination.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Create Issue
actions.description: Create a new issue in a repository. GitHub issue responses should be read from the assignees array rather than depending on the older singular assignee field.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Must be application/vnd.github+json for current API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. Latest supported version is 2026-03-10. 2022-11-28 remains supported for compatibility.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests (e.g., Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin).

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

body.description: The contents of the issue in Markdown.

assignees.description: Logins for the users to assign to this issue (e.g., ['octocat', 'hubot']).

labels.description: Labels to apply to the issue (e.g., ['bug', 'enhancement']).

milestone.description: The number of the milestone to associate this issue with.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: List Pull Requests
actions.description: List pull requests for a repository.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

url.description: Pull requests URL for the repository (e.g., https://api.github.com/repos/octocat/Hello-World/pulls).

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Must be application/vnd.github+json for current API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. Latest supported version is 2026-03-10. 2022-11-28 remains supported for compatibility.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests (e.g., Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin).

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

state.description: Filter by pull request state. Defaults to 'open'.

head.description: Filter by head user/org and branch name (e.g., 'octocat:feature-branch').

sort.description: Field to sort by. Defaults to 'created'.

page.description: Page number of the results to fetch. Defaults to 1.

queryParams.description: Optional query parameters for filtering and pagination.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Create Pull Request
actions.description: Create a pull request in a repository. Avoid depending on deprecated null placeholder response fields and instead read the documented current response shape.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

url.description: Pull requests URL for the repository (e.g., https://api.github.com/repos/octocat/Hello-World/pulls).

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Must be application/vnd.github+json for current API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. Latest supported version is 2026-03-10. 2022-11-28 remains supported for compatibility.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests (e.g., Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin).

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

title.description: The title of the pull request.

issue.description: The number of an existing issue to convert into a pull request. If provided, 'title' may be omitted.

body.description: The contents of the pull request in Markdown.

head.description: The name of the branch where your changes are implemented.

base.description: The name of the branch you want the changes pulled into.

head_repo.description: The name of the repository where the head branch is located, if different from the base repository (e.g., 'octocat/fork-repo').

draft.description: Whether to open the pull request as a draft. Defaults to false.

maintainer_can_modify.description: Indicates whether maintainers can modify the pull request branch. Defaults to true.

body.description: Create pull request request body. Requires either 'title' or 'issue', along with 'head' and 'base'.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Must be application/vnd.github+json for current API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. Latest supported version is 2026-03-10. 2022-11-28 remains supported for compatibility.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests (e.g., Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin).

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

sort.description: Optional sort field. Defaults to 'best match'.

page.description: Page number of the results to fetch. Defaults to 1.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Search Issues And Pull Requests
actions.description: Search issues and pull requests across accessible repositories.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Must be application/vnd.github+json for current API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. Latest supported version is 2026-03-10. 2022-11-28 remains supported for compatibility.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests (e.g., Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin).

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

sort.description: Optional sort field. Defaults to 'best match'.

page.description: Page number of the results to fetch. Defaults to 1.

queryParams.description: Query parameters for searching issues and pull requests.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Get Rate Limits
actions.description: Get the current rate limit status for the authenticated user. Prefer the 'resources' object, especially 'resources.core', instead of depending on deprecated top-level 'rate' fields.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Must be application/vnd.github+json for current API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. Latest supported version is 2026-03-10. 2022-11-28 remains supported for compatibility.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests (e.g., Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin).

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.
